channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: Pentagon policy illegally banned transgender troops from military service, appeals court panel rules - AP News

Why Trump Is Suddenly Asking Americans to Look Away - The Atlantic
Sabalenka powers past Osaka in first women’s night match in Paris since 2023 - The Guardian

An Iranian outlet closely tied to the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps signaled Monday that Tehran could activate additional maritime fronts against global shipping routes, including the strategically vital Bab el-Mandeb Strait near Yemen. - facebook.com
Snap alumni launch Ghost Angels fund to back the next wave of social media - The Daily Star
Trump administration will temporarily pause $1.8 billion fund, complying with court order - The Washington Post
